title: CRISPR Therapeutics to Report Q3 Earnings: Is a Beat in Store?
text: CRISPR Therapeutics Q3 2024 Earnings Preview. Revenue Expectations: The Zacks Consensus Estimate for Q3 2024 total revenues stands at $6.4 million. EPS Expectations: The same consensus estimate for earnings was pegged at a loss of $1.33 per share. Operational Drivers: CRSP was studying its first two in-vivo candidates, CTX310 and CTX320, in separate phase I clinical studies targeting ANGPTL3 and lipoprotein(a), respectively, with activities related to developing the company's pipeline candidates likely to have escalated operating expenses in the to-be-reported quarter. Financial Background: As of March 31, 2024, CRISPR Therapeutics reported a strong cash position with approximately $2.1 billion in cash, cash equivalents, and marketable securities, bolstered by a recent $280 million capital raise through a registered direct offering. Clinical Progress Expected: Management was expected to provide updates on the CASGEVY launch progress, including the number of authorized treatment centers and patient enrollment numbers. Pipeline candidates CTX112, CTX131, CTX310, and CTX320 were expected to be discussed.
